case.clinical_note: Outpatient rheumatology prior-auth request for adalimumab (Humira). Patient: Jordan Blake, age 52. Diagnosis: rheumatoid arthritis (ICD-10 M06.9), RF and anti-CCP positive. Disease duration: 14 months. Methotrexate trial: 16 weeks at stable dose. Failed conventional DMARDs: 2 (documented trials). Today's DAS28 score: 4.8. Requesting continuation authorization for Humira.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires confirmed rheumatoid arthritis (ICD-10 M05/M06), disease duration of at least 6 months, failure of at least 2 conventional DMARDs, DAS28 score of at least 3.2, and a methotrexate trial of at least 12 weeks.

proposed_rationale: All RA criteria documented and met: 14-month duration, DAS28 4.8, 2 failed DMARDs, 16-week MTX trial.

case.clinical_note: Endocrinology prior-auth request for semaglutide (Ozempic). Patient: Harper Wells, age 54. Diagnosis: type 2 diabetes mellitus (E11.9). Diabetes duration: 5 years. Most recent A1C: 8.2%. Metformin trial: 6 months at max tolerated dose. BMI: 33.1. Requesting Ozempic for glycemic control.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires a documented type 2 diabetes diagnosis, most recent A1C of at least 7.0%, metformin trial of at least 3 months at tolerated dose, and BMI recorded in the chart.

proposed_rationale: A1C 8.2%, 6-month metformin, BMI documented; all criteria met.

case.clinical_note: Neurology prior-auth request for erenumab (Aimovig). Patient: Nova Bell, age 38. Diagnosis: chronic migraine (G43.7). Migraine headache days per month: 18. Failed triptan trials: 2. Failed preventive medication trials: 1. Requesting Aimovig for migraine prevention.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires chronic migraine diagnosis, at least 15 migraine days per month, documented failure of at least 2 triptans, and failure of at least 1 preventive migraine medication.

proposed_rationale: 18 headache days/month with chronic migraine and failed triptans/preventive.
